gt_sql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 348 ORDER BY T1.time ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.raceId = 348
ORDER BY CAST(lt.time AS INTEGER) ASC
LIMIT 1
question: Who was the driver that got the best lap time in the race No. 348? Give his full name.
